---
title: "Your Name"
---

# Your Name

PhD Student in Mathematics  
Department of Mathematics  
University Name

Email: your.email@university.edu

---

## About Me

I am a PhD student in mathematics at University Name, working under the supervision of Professor Advisor Name.

My research interests include:

- Area 1
- Area 2
- Area 3

---

## Research Interests

My work focuses on mathematical problems involving ...

---

## News

**July 2026**

New update about your research.

**May 2026**

Presented a talk at ...

---

## Selected Publications

1. Author Name. *Paper Title*. Journal, Year.

2. Author Name. *Paper Title*. arXiv, Year.
